info.title: Ecomapp Main-buildTime
info.description: Ecomapp is a comprehensive e-commerce platform API that provides endpoints for product management, order processing, user authentication, and more to facilitate seamless online shopping experiences.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product listings, including creation, retrieval, update, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for managing customer orders, order tracking, and order history.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User management functionality such as registration, authentication, and profile updates.

tags.name: payments
tags.description: Handles payment processing and transaction details.

tags.name: shipping
tags.description: Manages shipping options, tracking, and delivery status.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart contents for the user identified by userId. Returns the full details of the cart including all items, quantities, and totals.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

example.message: The provided userId is invalid.

details.issue: User ID must be a valid string identifier.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds an item represented by the request body to the shopping cart of the specified userId. Returns the updated cart including all items and their quantities.

requestBody.description: The cart item object containing product identifier and quantity to add

400.description: Invalid input data for adding to cart

example.message: The cart item data is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a specific user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId, based on their current cart or submitted order details. Returns the created order information.

400.description: Invalid data or bad request for placing order

example.message: The order request contains invalid or missing information.
The specified user or their cart was not found.

details.issue: No cart available for the given user.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve order details by order ID
get.description: Fetches all details of an order identified by the orderId, including items, status, and payment information.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid.

details.issue: Order ID must be a valid string identifier.

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.

details.issue: No matching order exists for the given ID.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process based on the provided payment request details such as amount, currency, and payment method. Returns the payment session or transaction details.

requestBody.description: The payment request containing transaction and payment method details

example.message: The payment request contains invalid or missing information.

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero.

402.description: Payment required - payment failed or insufficient funds

example.message: The payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds or declined card.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Handles incoming webhook notifications from the payment gateway. Processes payment status updates and triggers related business workflows. Accepts JSON payload representing the payment webhook event.

requestBody.description: Payment webhook payload sent by the payment gateway

400.description: Bad request due to invalid webhook payload

example.message: The webhook payload is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

details.issue: Transaction ID is required and must be a string.

402.description: Payment required or payment related error

example.message: Payment could not be processed due to insufficient funds.

details.issue: Insufficient funds to complete the payment.

500.description: Internal server error while processing webhook

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product entry in the product catalog. Requires detailed product information in JSON format. Returns the newly created product resource upon success.

requestBody.description: Details of the product to add

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid product data

example.message: Provided product data is incomplete or invalid.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number.

409.description: Conflict due to existing product SKU

example.message: A product with the given SKU already exists.

500.description: Internal server error during product creation

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current shipping status and tracking details for the specified orderId. Returns tracking information that helps customers monitor their delivery progress.

200.description: Current tracking information for the order

example.message: No shipping information found for the given order ID.

details.issue: No shipment exists for this order identifier.

500.description: Internal server error during tracking retrieval

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided user details. Accepts JSON body with user credentials and profile data. Returns the created user information upon success.

requestBody.description: Information for creating a new user account

400.description: Bad request due to invalid user data

example.message: Provided user information is missing or invalid.

details.issue: Email address is required and must be valid format.

409.description: Conflict due to user already existing

example.message: A user with the given email or username already exists.

500.description: Internal server error during user registration

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: The currency code for the item's price, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: The discount amount applied to this cart item.

finalPrice.description: The final price of the cart item after discounts.

price.description: The original price of a single unit of the product.

productName.description: The name of the product in the cart.

quantity.description: The quantity of the product added to the cart.

currency.description: The currency code for all monetary values in the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the shopping cart.

payableAmount.description: The total amount payable after applying discounts.

totalAmount.description: The sum of the original prices for all items in the cart.

totalDiscount.description: The cumulative discount applied to the whole cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user owning the cart.

discount.description: The discount amount applied on the order item.

finalPrice.description: The final price paid for this item after discount.

price.description: Original price of a single unit of the product before discount.

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product ordered.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

currency.description: The currency code used for the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts on the order.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

status.description: Current fulfillment status of the order.

totalAmount.description: Total original price of all items before discount.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied on the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: The total amount to be paid in the specified currency.

currency.description: The currency code (ISO 4217) in which the payment is made.

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order associated with this payment.

paymentGateway.description: The payment gateway used to process the payment.

paymentMethod.description: The method of payment selected by the user.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the payment was created, in ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: The currency code (ISO 4217) used for the payment.

orderId.description: The unique identifier for the order associated with this payment.

paymentId.description: The unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: The payment method that was used to complete the payment.

status.description: The status of the payment transaction.

transactionId.description: The unique identifier provided by the payment gateway for the transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: The response message returned from the payment gateway webhook.

paymentId.description: The unique identifier for the payment related to this webhook event.

status.description: The current status of the payment as reported by the webhook.

transactionId.description: The transaction identifier received from the payment gateway webhook.

available.description: Indicates whether the product is currently available for purchase.

brand.description: The brand or manufacturer of the product.

category.description: The category to which the product belongs.

currency.description: The currency code used for the product's price.

description.description: A detailed description of the product.
description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

price.description: The price of the product in the specified currency.

rating.description: The average customer rating of the product.

stock.description: The number of units currently in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

brand.description: Name of the brand producing the product

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the price value

description.example: A high-quality wireless Bluetooth speaker with exceptional sound.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

stock.description: Number of items available in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date in ISO 8601 format

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the tracking information was last updated

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

trackingId.description: Unique tracking number assigned by the courier

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency code for transactions

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, customer)

active.description: Whether the user account is currently active

country.description: Country of residence of the user

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the user was created

email.description: Email address associated with the user

phone.description: Phone number of the user, including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update made to the user record

userType.description: Classification of the user (e.g., admin, customer)

error.description: Brief error title describing the client error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the reason for the client error

status.description: HTTP status code of the client error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error was generated

path.description: The API endpoint path that was called when the error occurred

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request used for tracking and debugging

errorCode.description: Application-specific error code identifying the type of client error

details.description: Detailed list of specific errors related to individual fields

field.description: Name of the field with the issue

issue.description: Description of the problem with the field

error.description: Brief error title describing the server error

message.description: Detailed message explaining the cause of the server error

status.description: HTTP status code of the server error

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the error was generated

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request used for tracking and debugging
